instruction: Building a coffee cup step by step (step 2 of 6). So far you've drawn: saucer. Add the next part: rect (x=36, y=56, width=48, height=48, fill #f5f5f5, stroke #222, stroke-width 2) with id "cup-body".
initial_svg:

  <ellipse id="saucer" fill="#cccccc" cx="64" cy="104" rx="40" ry="6" />

target_svg:
